name: Bannerman Energy Ltd
content: Bannerman Energy Ltd is an Australian-listed uranium development company focused on its flagship Etango Uranium Project in Namibia. Located in the Erongo Region, Etango is one of the world's largest undeveloped uranium assets, possessing a significant mineral resource and a completed Definitive Feasibility Study. The company is dedicated to the responsible development of this project to meet the growing global demand for carbon-free nuclear energy. Bannerman leverages its long-standing presence in Namibia and strong environmental, social, and governance (ESG) commitments to advance Etango toward production.
